title: Rajagopala Perumal Temple
tagline: Rajagopala Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Rajagopala Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple located at Manimangalam, near Tambaram, a suburb of Chennai, India.
overview.description: Rajagopala Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple located at Manimangalam, near Tambaram, a suburb of Chennai, India. The temple is dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Manimangalam
topPlaces.description: Manimangalam is a small town located in the Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in Southern India, famous for its ancient temples and inscriptions documenting the history of the ancient Tamil kings

topPlaces.name: Karasangal
topPlaces.description: Karasangal is a village located in South Chennai in the Kancheepuram District of Tamil Nadu, India. It is very close to Chennai city and is 45 km from the famous temple town of Kancheepuram and close to Vandalur and Tambaram.

topPlaces.name: Malaipattu
topPlaces.description: Malaipattu is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

topPlaces.name: Somangalam Sundararaja Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Sundararaja Perumal Temple is a Perumal temple situated at Somangalam neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in India. This temple is constructed about 950 years ago.

topPlaces.name: Somangalam Somanatheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Somanatheeswarar Temple is a Shiva temple at Somangalam in Kanchipuram of Tamil Nadu state in India.

topPlaces.name: Padappai
topPlaces.description: Padappai is a town near Chennai, India. It is a small town developing fast in Chennai suburbs about 12 km from Tambaram connected to Bangalore highway and near Oragadam SIPCOT & many big companies like Nissan, Appolo tyres, Alstom T&D, Tii Techno Testing Services PVT LTD, Infac India are few companies near this small town.

topPlaces.name: Varadharajapuram
topPlaces.description: Varadharajapuram is a panchayat and a small southern suburb of Chennai, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Varadhrajapuram lies between Mudichur and Mannivakkam, 6.5 km from Tambaram.

topPlaces.name: Mannivakkam
topPlaces.description: Mannivakkam is a town near Chennai Metropolitan City in the Indian state of Tamil-Nadu India. Mannivakkam lies between Vandalur and Mudichur, 7.5 kilometers from Tambaram and 2 kilometers from Vandalur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajagopala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajagopala Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rajagopala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (32 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajagopala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajagopala Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajagopala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Rajagopala Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajagopala Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manimangalam, Karasangal, Malaipattu, Somangalam Sundararaja Perumal Temple, Somangalam Somanatheeswarar Temple.
